title: Trade Signal
description: Unified signal object produced by convertJsonToSignals() in the Swing Committee analysis pipeline. Covers TAKE TRADE, WATCHLIST, and DAY TRADE verdict types.

name.description: Original ticker symbol as returned by AI, may include .L suffix (e.g. 'SHEL.L')

direction.description: Trade direction. WATCHLIST ONLY is used for watchlist-verdict signals.

verdict.description: Signal classification. Determines how the signal is displayed in the UI and recorded in Google Sheets.

entry.description: Entry price or zone. Single price for DAY TRADE, may be a range for TAKE TRADE (e.g. '$138.00-$140.00'), potential entry for WATCHLIST.

target.description: Target price level (T1 for swing trades, intraday target for day trades).

grade.description: Trade grade assigned by AI. Typically 'A+', 'A', or 'B'. Present for TAKE TRADE and optionally WATCHLIST. Always null for DAY TRADE.

pillarCount.description: Number of Six Pillars aligned (0-6). Present for TAKE TRADE and optionally WATCHLIST. Always null for DAY TRADE.

setupType.description: Human-readable setup description. For TAKE TRADE: setup name (e.g. 'VCP Breakout'). For WATCHLIST: first 50 chars of the watch note. For DAY TRADE: prefixed with 'Day Trade: ' (e.g. 'Day Trade: Bounce off daily pivot support').

riskReward.description: Risk:Reward ratio as string (e.g. '2.4:1'). Sourced from tradeAnalysis.riskReward1 for TAKE TRADE, from AI for DAY TRADE, always null for WATCHLIST.

rawSection.description: Full formatted markdown text with detailed analysis. Built by buildTradeAnalysisText (TAKE TRADE), buildWatchlistAnalysisText (WATCHLIST), or buildDayTradeAnalysisText (DAY TRADE).

oneOf.title: TAKE TRADE Signal
oneOf.description: Scanner-approved trade that passed the Six Pillars regime gate. Full swing trade with entry zone, stop, target, grade, and pillar alignment.

oneOf.title: WATCHLIST Signal
oneOf.description: Developing setup that did not pass the scanner threshold for swing trading. Includes potential levels if the setup improves.

oneOf.title: DAY TRADE Signal
oneOf.description: Intraday-only setup derived from daily S/R levels and ATR. Tighter stops (0.3-0.5 ATR), smaller targets (0.5-1.0 ATR). Must be closed by end of day.
